holdings.infoBox: OBOR is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are Kuwait Finance House K.S.C.P. stock at 9.03%, Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation at 7.63%, Valterra Platinum at 5.11%, KGHM Polska Miedz at 4.86%, and China Yangtze Power at 4.27%.

overview.description: The KraneShares MSCI One Belt One Road Index ETF (OBOR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-selected, tier-weighted index of companies likely to benefit from China's One Belt, One Road initiative. OBOR was launched on Sep 7, 2017 and is issued by KraneShares.
